title: Nachos
ingredients: 1 cup shredded cheese (cheddar, Monterey Jack, etc.)
Toppings: jalapeños, black olives, sour cream, salsa
instructions: Spread tortilla chips on a baking sheet and top with cheese.
Bake for 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
Top with your favorite toppings and serve.

title: Hummus and Pita Bread
instructions: Serve hummus with pita bread for dipping.

title: Ghugni
ingredients: 2 cups dried yellow peas, soaked overnight
Tamarind chutney, chopped onions, and green chilies for garnish
instructions: Boil the soaked peas with salt and turmeric until they are soft but hold their shape.
In a pan, heat mustard oil. Sauté chopped onions until golden.
Add ginger-garlic paste and chopped tomato. Cook until mushy.
Add all the powdered spices and sauté. Add coconut pieces if using.
Pour in the boiled peas along with the water. Mash some of the peas to thicken the gravy.
Serve hot, garnished with a drizzle of tamarind chutney, raw chopped onions, and green chilies.
